description: Behavioral RED dominates a YELLOW static gate: Tier 1 PASS, Tier 2 YELLOW (warnings only, did not block Tier 3), Tier 3 ran and returned RED. Covers the (PASS, YELLOW, RED) corner of the (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, RED) decision-table row.
why: § 6 R7 (t3=RED). YELLOW did not block Tier 3 from running (§ 5 R2). Row (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, RED) -> FAIL.
